meta.purpose: Bind Dataverse tables and connectors to the Project Tracker Code App via `pac code add-data-source`, regenerating src/generated/** for each entry.
meta.goldenSequenceStep: Step 8 (register data sources) — runs only AFTER PublishAllXml has published every table, column, and relationship.
notes: Dataverse data sources use the singular entity logical name for -t and require NO connection ID (they bind through the environment's Dataverse connection).
Non-Dataverse connectors require a live connection ID (-c). Discover it with `pac connection list` (or the /list-connections skill) and substitute for the <CONN_*> placeholder — do not invent one.
Prefer the Code Apps plugin skills (/add-dataverse, /add-office365) which drive these commands and regenerate the typed service/model files.
Each command edits power.config.json (adds a databaseReference or connectionReference) and writes src/generated/services + src/generated/models.

dataSources.note: Reused OOB table targeted by dat_customer. Register so the app can read customer names.
Reused OOB table targeted by dat_presenter and dat_maintainer.
Provides seller/presenter profile and people-search data. Discover the connection ID with `pac connection list` (filter shared_office365users) or /list-connections before running.
